archive_data.question_text: किस राजा ने भुवनेश्वर में लिंगराज मंदिर का निर्माण करवाया था?

explanation.english: The Lingaraj Temple in Bhubaneswar was built by King Yayati Keshari of the Ganga dynasty. It is one of the oldest temples in Bhubaneswar dedicated to Lord Shiva.
explanation.tanglish: Bhubaneswar-il ulla Lingaraj kovil Ganga vamsathu rajaana Yayati Keshari-ala kattappattathu. Ithu Lord Shiva-kku arpitham aana oru praacheena kovil.

archive_data.question_text: कौन सा राष्ट्रीय उद्यान किस राज्य में स्थित है?

explanation.english: Keibul Lamjao National Park is located in Manipur. It is the world's only floating national park situated on Loktak Lake.
explanation.tanglish: Keibul Lamjao rasthriya udyanam Manipur-il ullathu. Ithu Loktak kulathil amarntha ulagileye mattum thaane irukkum thee plankum udyanam.

archive_data.question_text: प्रधानमंत्री और भारतीय संघ के अन्य मंत्रियों की नियुक्ति राष्ट्रपति द्वारा निम्नलिखित में से किसके अंतर्गत की जाती है?

explanation.english: According to Article 75 of the Indian Constitution, the President appoints the Prime Minister and other ministers of the Union on the advice of the Prime Minister.
explanation.tanglish: Bharatha samvidhanathin 75-am pathathin prakaaram, rasthrapathi nayaka mantrai matrum matra sanga mantrigalai nayaka mantrin thaalattin payannaale niyamanithu seigiraar.
